teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective protect_partner.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2, 3 cards) is likely trying to win control early or shed weak cards. With only public history (new_game), no signal exists yet, so partner strength is uniform; I should avoid leading a card that forces partner to spend high value unnecessarily.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponent player 1 has only 2 cards (near finish) and may hold strong/trump cards to exit soon; opponent player 3 has 3 cards. They will try to seize this lead to burn their strong cards or go out. Either opponent likely beats any single I lead.
